query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_logs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'rejected_duplicate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_dup_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'held' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as held_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'skipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as skipped_count
FROM ai_auto_review_logs WHERE isDryRun = 0;
